preamble: A transformation of [p] to [dz] involving palatalization, voicing, and affrication.

examples.note: Evolutionary path from a voiceless labial stop to a voiced alveolar affricate.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
